<?php namespace Illuminate\Filesystem; if (! function_exists('Illuminate\Filesystem\join_paths')) { /** * Join the given paths together. * * @param string|null $basePath * @param string ...$paths */ function join_paths($basePath, ...$paths): string { foreach ($paths as $index => $path) { if (empty($path) && $path !== '0') { unset($paths[$index]); } else { $paths[$index] = DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR.ltrim($path, DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR); } } return $basePath.implode('', $paths); } }
